{{Quote|It was terrible, there was so much blood and damage. Bodies were everywhere. I kept looking, hoping to see a Jedi, but there's never one around when you need one these days.|Rievale Creterk|<ref name="HNN 46">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|46|news/1337_4.html|15 Dead in Houk / Weequay Brawl at Eastport}}</ref>}}
'''Rievale Creterk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] flight attendant who witnessed a brawl between [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] and [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] in [[Eastport/Legends|Eastport]], which was located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Biography==
In [[Eastport/Legends|Eastport]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], a melee erupted between Houk and Weequay immigrants who were placed in adjacent holding rooms while waiting to be processed. Cultural enemies, they verbally assaulted each other before resorting to physical violence.

Since [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] were not allowed within the processing area, no shots were fired. However, those involved made use of blades and [[shiv]]s to harm each other. In the end, fifteen were left for [[Death/Legends|dead]] with forty-five wounded.

Creterk suffered a broken arm in the incident.
